ANALYTICAL post-processor on baseline preds. Re-clip binary to [0.10, 0.90]. 13 binary correct calls go 0.005 -> 0.020 (lose 0.015 each); 1 wrong (Perez/Lalami) goes 1.805 -> 1.620 (save 0.185). Per-event break-even ratio ~12.3 correct per 1 wrong. Sample has 1/14 wrong so essentially flat.

ANALYTICAL post-processor on baseline preds. Blend p_new = 0.85*p + 0.15/N. Hurts every high-confidence correct call (most events). Only SCOTUS (1.435->1.307) and Perez/Lalami (1.805->1.558) benefit. Total Brier worse by ~0.015.
